From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

The following is a list of **mayors of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk")**, [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"). It includes positions equivalent to mayor, such as chairperson of the city council executive committee.
